title: Peronocactus scopa
taxonomy: Peronocactus scopa is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. It was previously classified as Mammillaria scopa and was later reclassified into the genus Peronocactus. The classification change reflects the reorganization of the Mammillaria genus to accommodate the distinct species within the Peronocactus genus. As a result of its reclassification, Peronocactus scopa is now recognized as a distinct species within the Peronocactus genus. Peronocactus scopa's classification provides a more accurate and detailed understanding of its unique characteristics and relationships within the plant kingdom.
